title: GCP Cloud KMS Decrypt echo (gRPC, plaintext)
description: Mocks google.cloud.kms.v1.KeyManagementService/Decrypt over plaintext gRPC on Lyrebird's gRPC data plane (LYREBIRD_GRPC_PORT). Point the official KMS client at Lyrebird with option.WithEndpoint("host:port") (no scheme), option.WithoutAuthentication(), and grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()). Decrypt echoes the request ciphertext (field 2) back as the plaintext (response field 1) so base64-of-plaintext stubs round-trip; plaintext_crc32c (field 2) echoes the request's ciphertext_crc32c (field 5) when present, and protection_level=SOFTWARE(1) + used_primary=true are returned for realism. The respond body is a Lyrebird gRPC response field-spec (fN -> value/copyFrom), not raw JSON.
